name: Barrio X3
description: Barriox13 is a highly active Sureños street gang based in South Los Angeles, founded in the early 1970s near El Segundo Boulevard and San Pedro Street. The gang is divided into West Side and East Side factions, with over 5,000 members loyal to the Mexican Mafia. It is involved in narcotics, homicide, drug and human trafficking, and has expanded into Southern California and Mexico.
